questions.q: While stalking a rare antelope, a 75-year-old millionaire trophy hunter was recently trampled to death by a herd of elephants in which African country?
The European Union approved a massive $106 billion loan package for Ukraine in April 2026 after which country finally lifted its veto?
According to the head of the International Energy Agency in April 2026, the fossil fuel industry has been changed forever by an oil crisis triggered by a war involving which nation?
In a bid to push production into the United States, the Trump administration offered immediate tariff relief to aluminum and steel companies from which country if they relocate?
What item was used in a massive 20,000-piece installation near the US Congress to represent abducted Ukrainian children?
